title: Create release infrastructure — CHANGELOG, RELEASING, CI workflows, smoke test
description: 新建 v1.0 对外首发所需的发布基础设施: CHANGELOG.md (Keep-a-Changelog 格式), RELEASING.md (10-step 发布流程), scripts/sync-versions.mjs (workspace 版本一致性验证), .github/workflows/ci.yml (install+typecheck+test+i18n-lint+NO_COLOR snapshot), .github/workflows/release.yml (tag 触发 npm publish), docs/smoke-v1.0.md (真实闭环验证步骤). 前置: TASK-002 + TASK-008 (CI 需要 i18n-lint 已存在).

files.change: Keep-a-Changelog 1.0.0 format; initial [1.0.0] section listing all Wave A/B/C features; [Unreleased] section
10-step release guide: 1.版本检查 2.CHANGELOG更新 3.sync-versions验证 4.CI通过 5.tag创建 6.release.yml触发 7.npm publish确认 8.smoke test 9.GitHub Release 10.公告
Read all packages/*/package.json versions; verify all == root version; exit 1 with mismatch report if not aligned
Trigger on push/PR to main; steps: pnpm install → pnpm -r typecheck → pnpm -r test → node scripts/lint-protected-tokens.ts → NO_COLOR=1 snapshot tests
Trigger on tag push matching v*; steps: pnpm install → pnpm -r build → pnpm -r publish --access public; requires NPM_TOKEN secret
End-to-end smoke test: npm install -g @fabric/cli@1.0.0 → fab init → fab serve → curl MCP endpoint → open Dashboard → verify version display

implementation: Create CHANGELOG.md: [Unreleased] header; [1.0.0] section with Added entries for all implemented features (fab init, fab serve, Dashboard, MCP server, i18n, shared types)
Create RELEASING.md: ordered 10-step checklist covering version bump → tag → publish → smoke → announce
Create scripts/sync-versions.mjs: read root package.json version; iterate packages/*/package.json; compare; exit 1 with diff if any mismatch
Create .github/workflows/ci.yml: Node 20 matrix; pnpm/action-setup; cache; install; typecheck; test; lint-protected-tokens; NO_COLOR=1 snapshot verification
Create .github/workflows/release.yml: on: push tags: 'v*'; needs: ci; publish steps with NPM_TOKEN from secrets
Create docs/smoke-v1.0.md: numbered checklist of real end-to-end actions verifiable after npm publish
Verify sync-versions.mjs locally: node scripts/sync-versions.mjs (should exit 0 after TASK-002)
Validate ci.yml YAML syntax: npx js-yaml .github/workflows/ci.yml

reference.pattern: Keep-a-Changelog + GitHub Actions pnpm workspace publish
reference.examples: ci.yml: uses: pnpm/action-setup@v3 with version: 9; release.yml: env: NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}

criteria: CHANGELOG.md exists with Keep-a-Changelog format and [1.0.0] section
scripts/sync-versions.mjs exists and exits 0 when all packages are at 1.0.0
.github/workflows/ci.yml exists and passes YAML lint (npx js-yaml validation)
.github/workflows/release.yml exists and contains 'npm publish' or equivalent pnpm publish step
node scripts/sync-versions.mjs exits 0 with current repo state
convergence.definition_of_done: 发布基础设施完整: CHANGELOG + RELEASING + CI + release workflow + smoke checklist, 可支持 v1.0 对外首发

rationale.chosen_approach: 先建文件结构, CI/release workflow 引用已存在的 lint 脚本 (TASK-007) 和 i18n 测试 (TASK-008)
alternatives_considered: 使用 changesets 管理版本
decision_factors: locked decision: RELEASING.md 10-step in roadmap v1.2 scope treatment
sync-versions.mjs 简单脚本优于重量级工具
CI 必须在 TASK-008 i18n 测试存在后才能正确引用
rationale.tradeoffs: 手动 10-step 发布流程比 semantic-release 更透明但需要人工执行

manual_checks: CHANGELOG.md has [1.0.0] section with at least 5 Added entries
success_metrics: Both workflow YAMLs parse without errors

commit.message_template: chore(release): CHANGELOG + RELEASING + CI workflows + smoke-v1.0
